name: controle-inteligente-pdm-sap
description: MVP web para controle, sugestao, validacao e geracao de descricoes SAP MM baseadas em PDM.

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
